# harvester_kubeovn_vpc (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "harvester_kubeovn_vpc" "example" {
  name = "ovn-cluster"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) A unique name

### Read-Only

- `default_subnet` (String)
- `description` (String) Any text you want that better describes this resource
- `enable_bfd` (Boolean)
- `enable_external` (Boolean)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `labels` (Map of String)
- `message` (String)
- `namespaces` (List of String)
- `policy_routes` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--policy_routes))
- `router` (String)
- `standby` (Boolean)
- `state` (String)
- `static_routes` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--static_routes))
- `subnets` (List of String)
- `tags` (Map of String)

<a id="nestedatt--policy_routes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `policy_routes`

Read-Only:

- `action` (String)
- `match` (String)
- `next_hop_ip` (String)
- `priority` (Number)


<a id="nestedatt--static_routes"></a>
### Nested Schema for `static_routes`

Read-Only:

- `cidr` (String)
- `ecmp_mode` (String)

- `policy` (String)
- `route_table` (String)
